post_topic: HITL gates as a design-first constraint, not a retrofit
image_description:
Single standalone diagram. One concept only. No panels, no grids, no collages. Full bleed 1080x1080px white background.

Title at top in bold navy text: "Design the gate first."

A single left-to-right horizontal pipeline flow diagram with two rows, stacked vertically, separated by a thin navy divider line. Each row has a label on the far left: top row labeled "HITL as afterthought" in small gray text; bottom row labeled "HITL as design anchor" in amber #F5A623 bold text.

TOP ROW (afterthought pattern): Five boxes arranged left to right connected by right-pointing arrows. Box 1 (large, navy fill, white label): "Trigger". Arrow right. Box 2 (large, navy fill, white label): "LLM Call". Arrow right. Box 3 (very small, gray dashed border, gray label, visually de-emphasized): "Human Gate". Arrow right. Box 4 (large, navy fill, white label): "Action Executor". Arrow right. Box 5 (large, navy fill, white label): "Output". A small red callout annotation in amber pointing at Box 3: "Smallest element. No timeout. No escalation defined."

BOTTOM ROW (design-first pattern): Five boxes arranged left to right connected by right-pointing arrows. Box 1 (medium, navy fill, white label): "Trigger". Arrow right. Box 2 (medium, navy fill, white label): "LLM Call". Arrow right. Box 3 (very large, bold blue #5a96ff border, navy fill, white bold label — visually dominant, roughly 2x the height of surrounding boxes): "HUMAN GATE" with three sub-labels stacked inside in smaller white text: "Context surfaced", "Timeout: 15 min → escalate", "Approve / Reject / Defer". Arrow right. Box 4 (medium, navy fill, white label): "Action Executor". Arrow right. Box 5 (medium, navy fill, white label): "Output". A green checkmark callout annotation in amber pointing at Box 3: "Loudest element. Named. Defined. Built around."

Below both rows, a single line of small navy italic text centered: "Automation exists to serve the gate — not the other way around."

Navy #0A0F1E primary elements, blue #5a96ff highlights, amber #F5A623 callouts and important labels. Clean sans-serif font. Real cloud provider logos where relevant. Small text "Kelvin Davis" bottom right corner. Professional LinkedIn infographic style similar to ByteByteGo. White background. No dark backgrounds.
